integration_key.description: Pendo integration key, sent as the x-pendo-integration-key header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Pendo Engage API v1 base URL override for tests, regions, or proxies.

limit.description: Records per page for the four legacy list streams (1-500 in the native connector).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages for the legacy cursor-paginated streams; 0/all/unlimited means exhaust.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for legacy native connector fixture mode.

page_id.description: Pendo page id used by the corresponding detail stream.

page_ids.description: Pendo page ids used by the corresponding detail stream.

feature_id.description: Pendo feature id used by the corresponding detail stream.

feature_ids.description: Pendo feature ids used by the corresponding detail stream.

tracktype_id.description: Pendo tracktype id used by the corresponding detail stream.

visitor_id.description: Pendo visitor id used by the corresponding detail stream.

visitor_history_starttime.description: Pendo visitor history starttime used by the corresponding detail stream.

account_id.description: Pendo account id used by the corresponding detail stream.

bulkdelete_id.description: Pendo bulkdelete id used by the corresponding detail stream.

segment_id.description: Pendo segment id used by the corresponding detail stream.

report_id.description: Pendo report id used by the corresponding detail stream.

guide_id.description: Pendo guide id used by the corresponding detail stream.

metadata_kind.description: Pendo metadata kind used by the corresponding detail stream.

metadata_group.description: Pendo metadata group used by the corresponding detail stream.

metadata_field_name.description: Pendo metadata field name used by the corresponding detail stream.

blacklist_type.description: Pendo blacklist type used by the corresponding detail stream.

server_name.description: Pendo server name used by the corresponding detail stream.

flag_name.description: Pendo flag name used by the corresponding detail stream.
